title: Visualizing shipping through the Strait of Hormuz since war began
snippet: Traffic through Hormuz running at about 5% of pre-war average. Only 154 vessels crossed in all of March vs 3,000/month pre-war. IRGC published alternative routes through Iran's territorial waters. Official IMO shipping lane almost entirely abandoned. 800 ships trapped in Persian Gulf.
tag_reason: CNN visual deep-dive with new data: 5% traffic, 154 ships in March, 800 trapped — first comprehensive shipping analysis
